sourceMovie.title: Vincent Must Die
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Vincent Must Die works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps 2: Unleashed
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vincent Must Die clicked for you, Ginger Snaps 2: Unleashed (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and fantasy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Vincent Must Die?
faq.answer: Try Ginger Snaps 2: Unleashed, Look Away, Constantine—each shares DNA with Vincent Must Die while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Vincent Must Die?
faq.answer: Vincent Must Die (2023) is best described as Drama, Fantasy, Thriller, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Vincent Must Die worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
